messages.content: Hello. No one ever got back with me.
I apologize for the delay in getting back to you. How can I assist you today? If you have any specific questions or issues regarding your Rambo bike, please let me know, and I'll do my best to help!
Are the prices on the demos negotiable?
That's something our team will need to review — let me get the right person involved and they'll follow up with you shortly.
I'm connecting you with our team now. They'll follow up with you shortly regarding your question about demo prices.
